title: Fix PlanPurchaseButton async-state tests broken post Astro 6 bump

tasks.title: Instrument handleClick + capture precise failure mode
tasks.description: Document the failure. Root cause found here: apiClient.request() called getBaseUrl()/validateWebEnv() OUTSIDE its try/catch; without PUBLIC_API_URL in jsdom it threw before fetch(), bypassing the fetch mocks. React 19 batching collapsed setLoading(true)+setLoading(false) into one render so the loading state was never visible. NOT a timing/concurrent-mode regression as the spec hypothesized.

tasks.title: Try pool: threads
tasks.description: NOT NEEDED. Root cause (T-131-01) was the env-URL bug, not the vitest pool. No pool change applied.

tasks.title: Try @vitejs/plugin-react-oxc swap
tasks.description: NOT NEEDED. Root cause was env, not the react plugin. No swap applied.

tasks.title: Bisect React 19 patches
tasks.description: NOT NEEDED. Root cause was env, not a React patch regression. React version unchanged.

tasks.title: Apply working fix + remove skipIf
tasks.description: 3-part fix: (1) move URL computation inside try/catch in apps/web/src/lib/api/client.ts so a misconfigured env returns { ok:false } instead of throwing (honors ApiResult<T>); (2) add PUBLIC_API_URL + PUBLIC_SITE_URL to apps/web/vitest.config.ts test env; (3) update stale endpoint assertion /checkout -> /subscriptions/start-paid and set SPEC_131_PENDING=false. Target file 29/29; full web suite 3725 passed, 8 skipped, 0 failed. Commit 9692042aa.

tasks.title: PR to staging
tasks.description: PR to staging, CI Pass SUCCESS gate, merge --merge, closeout (spec.md + both indexes completed+archived). Single PR (code + tracking + closeout bundled — small spec).
